memoryArtifacts.headline: Visitation of Gloucester 1623 (Denys Family Pedigree)
memoryArtifacts.description: The Denys family pedigree from The Visitation of Gloucestershire 1623, a survey made by officers of the College of Arms to investigate whether people were entitled to the arms they used. The Visitation included the family trees of those investigated. In most cases no dates were recorded, only names. Such Visitations are usually, but not always accurate.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Denys於1470年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆時，他的父親Walter Dennys33歲，母親Agnes Danvers25歲。他於大約1490年與Edith Twynyho在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1533年6月22日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Denys于1470年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆时，他的父亲Walter Dennys33岁，母亲Agnes Danvers25岁。他于大约1490年与Edith Twynyho在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1533年6月22日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Denys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Lucien.  Polish Casimir, Wiktor.
Flemish and French: from a variant of the personal name   Denis  .

Polish, Rusyn, and Ukrainian: from the personal name Denys, an equivalent of Dennis . In some cases this may also be an American shortened form of patronymics from the personal name Denys, such as Ukrainian Denysenko and Denysevych, Polish Denysiewicz.

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Denys was born in 1470, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Dennys, was 33 and his mother, Agnes Danvers, was 25. He married Edith Twynyho about 1490, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 22 June 1533, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Denys est né en 1470, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Dennys, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Danvers, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Edith Twynyho environ 1490, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Denys 1470 in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Dennys 33 und seine Mutter Agnes Danvers 25. Er hat um 1490 in Gloucestershire, England Edith Twynyho geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Juni 1533 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Denys è nato il nel 1470 nel Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Dennys, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Danvers, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Edith Twynyho circa 1490, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 22 giugno 1533, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Denysが1470年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムで生まれた時，父Walter Dennysは33歳，母Agnes Danversは25歳であった。約1490年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでEdith Twynyhoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1533年6月22日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Denys(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Dennys(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Danvers(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1490년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Edith Twynyho(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 6월 22일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 디람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Denys nasceu em 1470, em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Dennys, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Danvers, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Twynyho aproximadamente 1490, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1533, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Denys родился в 1470 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Dennys было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Danvers, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Twynyho около 1490 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 22 июня 1533 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Denys nació en 1470, en Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Dennys, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes Danvers, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Edith Twynyho aproximadamente 1490, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 22 de junio de 1533, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
